title: Using SIN for identity verification cannot be a condition of service
summary: When notified of the complaint, the financial institution confirmed to our Office that it collects and uses SIN s for legally required income reporting obligations, and to verify the identity of prospective customers with credit reporting agencies. The financial institution took the position that using the SIN as an extra validation point...
dedupKey: using sin for identity verification cannot be a condition of service|2017-12-20
